title: Terminal module exports for PTY management and ring buffer utilities
purpose: Provides exports for PTY session management and a ring buffer implementation used in terminal applications.
module_context: Exports the RingBuffer class and PTYManager singleton along with related type definitions for terminal session handling.

steps.content: Expose the RingBuffer class for fixed-size data storage with overwrite behavior.
Expose the PTYManager class for managing terminal sessions and processes.
Expose the singleton instance of PTYManager for global terminal session access.
